page: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Eadv6 family. It is powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor operating at 3.7 GHz, featuring 16 physical cores and 32 vCPUs with 2.0 threads per core. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It also includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities across several domains. The single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is rated in the top tier, while multi-core CPU performance falls in the average tier. Memory performance is robust, with a strong PassMark memory score and average memory bandwidth read/write speeds. In decompression and text processing, the instance registers strong results. Additionally, text generation for small language models achieves top-tier performance, while prompt processing for the same model size is strong.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E32ads_v6 offers a high-density memory profile combined with substantial local storage, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads without requiring dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of 256.0 GB of RAM, a 1890 GB local disk, and strong single-core performance makes this instance well-suited for relational databases, memory-cached applications, data analytics, and text or image processing workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is an x86_64 server instance from the Eadv6 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. It features 32 vCPUs, 16 physical cores, and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. Benchmark data highlights top-tier single-core CPU performance and top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. It also delivers strong performance in multi-threaded decompression, image processing, and memory tests. Lacking a GPU, this instance is optimized for memory-heavy and storage-reliant workloads. It is highly suitable for databases, memory-cached applications, data analytics, and text processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family server with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 CPU. It is optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC CPU.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual machine featuring 256 GB RAM, dedicated AMD EPYC processing, and high-capacity local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor at 3.7 GHz with 32 vCPUs
Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and small-model LLM text generation
Strong performance in memory benchmarks, image processing, and decompression
Designed for memory-intensive applications, databases, and data analytics
